Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Continued To Dec-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-21-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

David F. Perry, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, National Association.
No appearance by defendants Ad Lib Creative Services LLC, a limited liability company or Lars I. Roner.

Amended Defaults entered against defendants on September 16, 2008.
Doe Defendants were dismissed on September 16, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on October 17, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, National Association, and against the Defaulted Defendants Ad Lib Creative Services LLC, a limited liability company and Lars I. Roner as follows:

Damages/Principal - $136,650.03.
Prejudgment Interest - $34,401.19.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $465.00.
Late Charges - $2,875.21, for a total judgment in the amount of $177,216.43.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2008 Continued To Oct-24-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
